BURUBURU POLICE STATION — OCCURRENCE BOOK EXTRACT
OB No. 91/29/06/24
Date: 29 June 2024
Time: 1000 hrs

Reporting officer: PC Njoroge (Service No. 91022)
Station: Buruburu Police Station, Nairobi

Particulars:
Suspect Aisha Mohammed (held since 24 June 2024) was processed at this
station on 29 June 2024 for transfer paperwork. The suspect refused to sign
the bond release form citing "I have not been told what I am signing." The
suspect requested counsel. The advocate Wanjiku from Wanjiku & Associates
arrived at 1240 hrs. Access was permitted for fifteen minutes only on the
instruction of OCS Buruburu.

The advocate noted on the record that her client had not seen a magistrate
in five days, contrary to Article 49(1)(f) of the Constitution of Kenya,
2010.

Signed: PC Njoroge
